item.title: Apple's iPhone 17e at $499: 4 Ways It Crushes Budget Phones Amid Amazon's 1-Hour Delivery Boom
item.description: Ever wondered how Apple's affordable iPhone 17e could shake up your daily tech routine, especially with Amazon delivering it in an hour? We're diving into how this budget beast stacks up against rivals, plus Nintendo's gaming tweaks and AI tools like Gamma that are making creativity instant and effortless.
